steps: Dissect larvae in 0 mM Ca 2+ HL-3 solution at room temperature.
Subject to a stimulation of 90 mM K + /0.5 (or 2) mM Ca 2+ HL-3 solution for 5 min to load boutons with the FM1-43 dye. 00:05:00
Remove excess dye by extensive washing with 0 mM Ca 2+ HL-3 solution for 10 min. 00:10:00
Image FM1-43 dye uptake by boutons to indicate “Loading”.
Subsequently, unload the dye loaded in SVs by stimulation using 90 mM K + /0.5 (or 2) mM Ca 2+ solution for 1 min. 00:01:00
Remove released dye by several washes with a 0 mM Ca 2+ HL-3 solution.
Image the remaining dye in boutons to indicate “Unloading”.

Calculate final FM1-43 dye intensity in boutons by subtracting the dye fluorescence intensity in surrounding muscles from the dye fluorescence intensity within boutons. The dye fluorescence intensity of at least 10 type Ib boutons from the same muscles 6 and 7 was averaged to obtain each data value. The dye unloading efficiency was indicated as (F load -F unload )/F load . Images processing was achieved using Image J and LSM Zen.
creator: Chi-Kuang Yao
